items.name_en: Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 446744.
Dimensions: 22(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Light Grey / Genuine leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick.

items.name_en: Genuine Leather Gucci Horsebit 1955 Phone Brown
items.name_cn:
Genuine Leather Gucci Horsebit 1955 Phone Brown
Top-tier this I was sold by the packaging,
Saw the packaging moment I decided must do!
But I still shallow,
Packaging good count what, bag self is explosive!
Very easy on eyes, originally Horsebit item won't ugly where go!
This year many clothes brands also incorporated Horsebit elements.
Self-kept, cabbage price, close eyes enter!
Give boyfriend also come one, couple bag ah, not fragrant ah!
Model 625615
Size 17x11x4cm

items.name_en: Genuine Leather Top-tier Original Batch🔥GG Crescent Mini Bag. This mini bag features a crescent shape with GG Supreme canvas, exuding a rich retro vibe. Each brand series is dedicated to exploring different eras, and this mini accessory embodies the brand's passion for the past. Adjustable handle (17cm) Metal chain strap (60cm) Model: 726843 Dimensions: 22 x 12.5 x 5cm

items.name_en: Genuine quality
items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
The mini Saddle Bag 1955 series adds a mix-and-match vibe to this retro style series. This mini bag comes with two different shoulder straps; paired with a matching tone leather strap it presents a low-key elegant look, while paired with a red and green webbing strap it highlights the strong brand identity. The bag is made of double G interlocking pattern canvas, trimmed with brown leather.
Model: 658574 Full Leather
Dimensions: 20.5x14x5cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Genuine quality
items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
GUCCI 1955 horsebit bag retro horsebit closure handbag. Gucci's retro trend is back, and designers and fashionistas are showing the correct way to enjoy G's style. Classic horsebit + monogram + brown trim design, full of retro vibes. The retro brown is super easy on the eyes. Little fairies who love retro matching must get this 🤘
Style No.: 602204, Dimensions: 25.5x18x6cm

items.name_en: GG Dionysus 2020ss New Dionysus The new Dionysus tiger head logo is diamond-encrusted, and the whole design has been simplified from complex to simple, retaining the classic medium size elegant and dainty bag shape, but the weight has become much lighter! No longer the complaint of being "as heavy as a stone". Ah~ this new Dionysus is really so perfect for me! Size: 25×13.5×7cm #499623m.

items.name_en: GG Horsebit: The brand that tops the list for a reason. When everyone has the GG monogram full leather series, the 1955 series adds a denim member. A low-key yet fashionable spokesperson, GG really knows how to do it, a perfect fit for the spring/summer collection. Lightweight, spacious, and easy to match—casual or goddess style, another must-have.

items.name_en: GG Marmont | Unlocking the Beauty of Symbols
items.name_cn:
GG Marmont | Unlocking the Beauty of Symbols
#Kiki Xu# Paired with a green top and basketball shoes, the black tonal GG Marmont handbag exudes a unique new look, with a soft yet structured design that is exquisite and three-dimensional.
